content:
# Finite Conductivity

**Summary**: The consideration of pressure drop due to friction and geometry within the wellbore itself.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-al-gahtani|Al-Gahtani, 2014]] incorporated finite-conductivity effects into the horizontal well model.

## Scientific Context

- [[2014-al-gahtani|Al-Gahtani, 2014]] Crucial for long horizontal wells where pressure drop in the pipe is significant.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2014-al-gahtani|Al-Gahtani, 2014]] Calculation of friction factors and wellbore geometry.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Wellbore hydraulics are not a linear function of flow rate, requiring non-linear solution methods. ([[2014-al-gahtani|Al-Gahtani, 2014, p. 51]])
